sources.title: Untamed (1955)
sources.description: When the great potato famine hits Ireland, the diaspora begins as thousands emigrate. Among those leaving the Emerald Isle is Katie O'Neill and her husband, who decide that the promised land is South Africa and make their way there. Once there, they discover the hardships that are the reality of the homesteader experience. Watch on RetroFlix:  https://retroflix.org/untamed-1955/

sources.title: Untamed (MGM,1929) JOAN CRAWFORD🍕 ROBERT MONTGOMERY
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Presents CLASSIC MOVIE MONDAY
Stars: Joan Crawford, Robert Montgomery, Ernest Torrence
Director: Jack Conway
🍕JOAN CRAWFORD in her Electrifying all-talking debut🍕
Set against a lush backdrop of steamy South American jungles and roaring New York streets, this Pre-Code Hollywood classic captures a pivotal moment in early sound cinema when women broke boundaries, and Joan Crawford led the charge. Co-starring Robert Montgomery and Ernest Torrence, directed by Jack Conway.

This rare gem from classic MGM studios is a must-see for fans of vintage cinema, silent-to-sound era transitions, and the unforgettable legacy of Pre-Code film. Watch now on PizzaFLIX, your home for timeless Hollywood treasures, curated with movie lovers in mind.

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

🍕 Subscribe to PizzaFLIX for more legendary performances, rare classics, and hidden Hollywood history!

metadata.Plot: When the great potato famine hits Ireland, the diaspora begins as thousands emigrate. Among those leaving the Emerald Isle is Katie O'Neill and her husband, who decide that the promised land is South Africa and make their way there. Once there, they discover the hardships that are the reality of the homesteader experience. To complicate matters, Katie meets up with the love of her life, Paul van Riebeck. Will there be betrayal on the veldt?
metadata.Writer: Talbot Jennings, Frank Fenton, Michael Blankfort
metadata.Actors: Tyrone Power, Susan Hayward, Richard Egan
